response.original_title: Blue Oyster Cult: 50th Anniversary Live – Second Night
response.overview: This show was filmed at Sony Hall in New York City, NY on September 22, 2022. This is the second of three 50th Anniversary releases, each containing a performance of one of the first three studio albums as well as a second set of songs from across their discography.
response.title: Blue Oyster Cult: 50th Anniversary Live – Second Night
